falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes below 4950 on any single day within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern typically features shallow retracements with no major breakdowns; a 7%+ drop from typical August 2024 levels would violate the structural integrity of the pattern match and indicate this is not a comparable accumulation base

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 2 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The August 2024 bottom was characterized by VIX compression and declining fear; sustained extreme volatility would contradict the pattern's volatility regime and invalidate the bottoming thesis

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y-2Y Treasury spread inverts further by >15bps from current level (deeper inversion)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The August 2024 bottom coincided with steepening yield curves and easing financial conditions; renewed aggressive curve flattening would signal deteriorating macro conditions incompatible with the pattern's economic backdrop

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
